checks.detail: all action-required rows have workflow dispatch commands
all action-required rows have download and ingest commands
all action-required rows have strict validation and refresh commands
payload contains placeholders and secret names only

requirements.title: Non-loopback Kubernetes or external HTTP service-node load
requirements.claim_unlocked: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
requirements.locked_claim: Non-loopback Kubernetes service-node cluster load SLO.
issues: cluster node requires at least 4 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
requirements.safe_dispatch_command: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" -f nodes_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="32" -f memories_per_namespace="8" -f workers="8" -f batch_query_size="24" -f replication_factor="3" -f read_quorum="1" -f read_fanout="1" -f p99_slo_ms="1000" -f commit_results="false"
requirements.publish_dispatch_command: gh workflow run external-http-cluster-load.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES" -f nodes_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_CLUSTER_NODES_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="32" -f memories_per_namespace="8" -f workers="8" -f batch_query_size="24" -f replication_factor="3" -f read_quorum="1" -f read_fanout="1" -f p99_slo_ms="1000" -f commit_results="true"
requirements.next_action: Provision prerequisites, run the safe dispatch command, download the artifact, ingest it, then rerun strict validation.

requirements.title: External HTTP active-active regions
issues: active-active region requires at least 3 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
requirements.safe_dispatch_command: gh workflow run external-http-active-active.yml -f regions="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" -f regions_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="16" -f p99_slo_ms="1500" -f commit_results="false"
requirements.publish_dispatch_command: gh workflow run external-http-active-active.yml -f regions="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS" -f regions_manifest_json="$WAVEMIND_ACTIVE_ACTIVE_REGIONS_MANIFEST_JSON" -f namespace_count="16" -f p99_slo_ms="1500" -f commit_results="true"
requirements.next_action: Provision prerequisites, run the safe dispatch command, download the artifact, ingest it, then rerun strict validation.

requirements.title: Managed/serverless remote telemetry
requirements.claim_unlocked: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
requirements.locked_claim: Hosted/serverless p99, cold-start, error-rate, and scale-out SLO.
issues: serverless node requires at least 1 URLs
warnings: WAVEMIND_API_KEY is not set; only use this if the target endpoints are intentionally unauthenticated
requirements.safe_dispatch_command: gh workflow run serverless-observed-telemetry.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" -f requests="240" -f workers="4" -f seed_memories="24" -f seed_mode="first" -f max_scale="256" -f target_rps="3200" -f target_p99_ms="500" -f external_cold_start_ms="900" -f estimated_scale_out_seconds="18" -f commit_results="false"
requirements.publish_dispatch_command: gh workflow run serverless-observed-telemetry.yml -f nodes="$WAVEMIND_SERVERLESS_NODES" -f requests="240" -f workers="4" -f seed_memories="24" -f seed_mode="first" -f max_scale="256" -f target_rps="3200" -f target_p99_ms="500" -f external_cold_start_ms="900" -f estimated_scale_out_seconds="18" -f commit_results="true"
requirements.next_action: Provision prerequisites, run the safe dispatch command, download the artifact, ingest it, then rerun strict validation.

requirements.title: 10M Qdrant service load
requirements.safe_dispatch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="false" -f qdrant_url="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL"
requirements.publish_dispatch_command: gh workflow run production-streaming-load.yml -f engine="qdrant-service" -f size="10000000" -f dim="128" -f queries="2000" -f top_k="10" -f batch_size="5000" -f target_recall="0.95" -f target_p99_ms="100.0" -f target_qps="100.0" -f replicas="3" -f autoscaling_max_replicas="24" -f capacity_headroom="0.7" -f runner_label="self-hosted-large" -f runner_storage_root="state/production-runs" -f commit_results="true" -f qdrant_url="$WAVEMIND_QDRANT_URL"
requirements.next_action: Provision the listed environment, run the command, then promote the result artifact through the ingest gate.

claim_boundary: Readiness report only. It does not unlock remote, 10M, 50M, 100M, managed Kubernetes, serverless, or active-active production claims.
